nodes.name: Galapagos hawk
nodes.summary: Galapagos hawk（Galapagos hawk，学名 Buteo galapagoensis），在图谱中标记为易危（VU）物种，主要威胁包括人类活动扰动。

nodes.name: 人类活动扰动
nodes.summary: 旅游、施工和高频活动影响繁殖或觅食。

nodes.name: VU
nodes.summary: VU表示 IUCN 易危等级，当前关联694种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、索马里鸵鸟、大斑几维鸟等694种鸟类。

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: Due to human disturbance to their natural habitat, a dwindling food supply because of new predators introduced to the islands, and persecution by humans, they are now extinct on the islands of Baltra, Daphne Major, Floreana, San Cristóbal, and North Seymour
